titles.title: It Is the Power of the Lord That Comes upon Us

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It is the power of the Lord that comes upon us it is the hand of the Lord that rests on us it is the power of the Most High that overshadows us.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The Spirit of the Lord there is no fear; The Spirit of the Lord there is freedom!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Clap your hands and shout, King is our god. Clap your hands and shout, King is our god. because he sits on the throne and rules, because he sits on the throne and rules.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He has disarmed the prince of this world And triumphed over the powers.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Honor, power and glory belong to him alone. Hallelujah!
